# HomunMage

> HomunMage is a sub-brand of PosetMage for AIGC and technology fields.

## Site Structure

- Home: /
- About: /About/
- Contact: /Contact/
- Slides: /Slides/

## How to Access Raw Markdown

Every page on this site has a raw markdown source available.
Append `index.md` to any page path to get the original markdown with YAML frontmatter.

Example:
- HTML page: /Slides/2026-ai-native-pm/
- Raw markdown: /Slides/2026-ai-native-pm/index.md

## Discovery

- /sitemap.xml — full list of all pages
- /Slides/ — directory listing of all slide decks
